title: Matrices, Job Dependencies, Outputs, and Immutable Artifacts · Independent Delivery Trial
summary: An independent delivery team receives an unfamiliar repository, event, runner, and trust constraint and must transfer matrices, job dependencies, outputs, and immutable artifacts into a new matrix and artifact handoff contract. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of matrix and artifact handoff contract with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design include and exclude rules, experimental axes, fail-fast, max-parallel, names, and support-policy coverage without combinatorial waste.
Trace needs dependencies, job results, always and failure conditions, skipped ancestors, and cleanup behavior through a directed graph.
Write multiline-safe step outputs, promote validated job outputs, handle size and secret redaction limits, and parse downstream types explicitly.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Commit to the mission model · Lab Ci Matrix Axis Coverage
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab matrix excludes one supported platform, overwrites artifact names, passes string outputs as booleans, and downloads an executable from another run. Prove graph results, types, producer identity, digest, layout, and trust.

What must be established before implementation?

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Ci Artifact Download Permission Integrity
steps.instruction:
Append the CI/CD evidence item headed "  # Evidence: ci-artifact-download-permission-integrity-kbv0z3". Tailor its handoff-contract.yaml change to the current stakeholder case, retain a deterministic workflow or release review, reject one concrete failure, and record a repair. The browser analyzes text only; run GitHub Actions, runner, Docker, registry, OIDC, Google Cloud, and deployment work later in authorized disposable transfer environments.

Evidence target: Extend the cumulative artifact · Lab Ci Artifact Download Permission Integrity.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Ci Artifact Download Permission Integrity into observable performance evidence. content.code:
# Evidence: ci-artifact-download-permission-integrity-kbv0z3
  - competency: ci-artifact-download-permission-integrity
    artifact: handoff-contract.yaml
    decision: artifact download permission integrity
    environment: single-job ephemeral self-hosted runner in a segmented subnet
    fault-injection: expire the only retained test artifact during incident reconstruction
    retained-proof: lock hash cold install test report package contents and output digest
    case-key: kbv0z3
    change: |
      matrix: node-22-24-by-ubuntu-macos-windows
      experimental: continue-only-declared-axis
      max-parallel: bounded
      needs: explicit-dag
      outputs: validated-json
      artifact-name: build-linux-x64-run8842
      artifact-digest: sha256-verified
      retention-days: 7
      hidden-files: excluded
    verify: enumerate matrix cases trace job results parse outputs and verify artifact ID digest layout retention and producer
    failure: Reject silent coverage exclusions, output type assumptions, artifact name reuse, hidden secret upload, or download as execution trust.
    repair: Prove matrix coverage, validate outputs, use unique immutable artifacts, verify digests and permissions, and bound retention.
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.

Competency probe: Download by expected run and artifact identity, verify digest and file layout, preserve permissions deliberately, and treat cross-run contents as untrusted.

For Defend the transferred model · Lab Ci Artifact Download Permission Integrity, challenge the documented misconception with workflow, run, artifact, policy, fault, repair, rollback, and transfer evidence: A successful download proves the artifact is safe to execute.
